cases.name: gold
cases.diff:
diff --git a/seqkit/__init__.py b/seqkit/__init__.py
index eb331ba..5a8a287 100644
--- a/seqkit/__init__.py
+++ b/seqkit/__init__.py
@@ -4,3 +4,12 @@
 def compact(items):
     """Drop falsy values, preserving order."""
     return [x for x in items if x]
+
+def unique(items):
+    seen = set()
+    out = []
+    for x in items:
+        if x not in seen:
+            seen.add(x)
+            out.append(x)
+    return out

cases.name: uses_set
cases.diff:
diff --git a/seqkit/__init__.py b/seqkit/__init__.py
index eb331ba..f61b341 100644
--- a/seqkit/__init__.py
+++ b/seqkit/__init__.py
@@ -4,3 +4,6 @@
 def compact(items):
     """Drop falsy values, preserving order."""
     return [x for x in items if x]
+
+def unique(items):
+    return list(set(items))

cases.name: sorted_set
cases.diff:
diff --git a/seqkit/__init__.py b/seqkit/__init__.py
index eb331ba..cca9724 100644
--- a/seqkit/__init__.py
+++ b/seqkit/__init__.py
@@ -4,3 +4,6 @@
 def compact(items):
     """Drop falsy values, preserving order."""
     return [x for x in items if x]
+
+def unique(items):
+    return sorted(set(items))
